failure_reason: Registered BML lowerer runtime record blueprints and BML-COMPILER-IMAGE, regenerated Go/Rust/TypeScript bp tables, replaced raw lowerer constructor NodeIDs with bp lookups, added BMLCompilerImageEmitter in high-level BML source, and proved the first source-derived BML compiler .fkb checkpoint. Initial image proof tried to embed parsed BML model list data under intern_node and failed because image children must be NodeIDs; narrowed the checkpoint payload to NodeID-safe source metadata and parsed counts. Final image proof returns 24; ratchet/lowerer/source/runtime proofs remain 26, 34, 42, 31, and 68; blueprint scan reports no unregistered type-99 NodeIDs.
